title: pouteria flavilatex
intro: Pouteria flavilatex is a plant species commonly known as the "yellow latex tree," belonging to the family Sapotaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Pouteria flavilatex can be prepared into herbal remedies like infusions, decoctions, and salves for its medicinal uses.
